title: VDD forward_request hardcodes google provider URL pattern violating OCP
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
solid
## Location
src/vdd/mod.rs:1361-1366
## Violation
Provider-routing branch is hardcoded by string match.

```rust
let url = if provider_name == "google" {
    format!("{base_url}/v1beta/models/{model}:generateContent")
} else {
    format!("{base_url}{endpoint}")
};
```

OCP violation — adding a new provider with non-standard URL conventions requires editing this function. The codebase already has a ProviderAdapter trait whose chat_endpoint(&model) is supposed to abstract this. The VDD module duplicates routing inconsistently.

## Mandated refactor
Move URL composition into ProviderAdapter trait via a full_chat_url(base_url, model) -> String method with a default impl. Override in the Google adapter.

## Filed from QA review dispatch
